path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 11 - F-Zero (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\02. Mute City (Melee).mp3
description: Such a good and underrated track. There are many versions of this song to choose from but spare a thought for this super well executed stadium rock version from Melee. I love it.
title: Mute City
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 11: F-Zero

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 11 - F-Zero (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\03. Mute City (Brawl).mp3
description: This one goes in much more of a metal direction which I don't love, but the original music is so good you can't really go wrong.
title: Mute City
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 11: F-Zero

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 11 - F-Zero (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\04. Mute City (for 3DS & Wii U).mp3
description: One of the first new remixes to come out of Smash 3DS, and let me tell you back then I was fucking loving it. I think this remix still goes super hard.
title: Mute City
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 11: F-Zero

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 11 - F-Zero (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\01. Mute City.mp3
description: The original mute city is class. It's great. That being said, I'd take these remixes over it.
title: Mute City
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 11: F-Zero

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 11 - F-Zero (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\07. Big Blue (Melee).mp3
description: Loooove this remix, especially how 'melee battlefield' the vibe is. The guitar solo is great. It's also kinda moody as well.
title: Big Blue
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 11: F-Zero

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 11 - F-Zero (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\05. Big Blue.mp3
description: I never could have expected that they actually top the Melee remix of Big Blue but here we are. This remix is so fucking good. I love this one melodic part in it, hard to describe in words how it is, it's the part played by the trumpet in the melee one, and when it goes high it changes to this other synth and yes I don't know I just really like it.
title: Big Blue
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 11: F-Zero

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 11 - F-Zero (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\06. Big Blue.mp3
description: A great track, also in the SNES soundfont. But catch me listening to the remixes.
title: Big Blue
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 11: F-Zero

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 11 - F-Zero (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\08. Sand Ocean.mp3
description: A remix of a deep cut from the original F-Zero. The synth chords genuinely sound grainy like sand, I don't know if they planned that.
title: Sand Ocean
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 11: F-Zero

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 11 - F-Zero (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\09. Sand Ocean.mp3
description: Those drums are kinda horrible to listen to.
title: Sand Ocean
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 11: F-Zero

album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 11: F-Zero

album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 11: F-Zero

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 11 - F-Zero (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\18. Fire Field.mp3
description: This remix is amazing. I have always loved it. The high pitched, distant-sounding lead guitar just sounds so cool. Great memories of this playing on the fight on the plane in Subspace Emissary. It's so intense and good.
title: Fire Field
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 11: F-Zero

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 11 - F-Zero (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\19. Fire Field.mp3
description: It's cool but I will always be picking the remix over this.
title: Fire Field
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 11: F-Zero
